name: [smoke] appearance="auto" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="neutral" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="primary" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="secondary" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="negative" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="positive" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="warning" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="informative" (Figma) renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="sparkle" renders (native extension — not in Figma API)
[fn] appearance="auto" resolves to secondary (not primary)
[smoke] renders without crashing (all defaults)
[smoke] renders with label and description
[smoke] renders checked without crashing
[smoke] renders disabled without crashing
[smoke] renders readOnly without crashing
[smoke] renders all sizes
[smoke] renders with children label
[fn] checked=false → accessibilityState.selected=false
[fn] checked=true → accessibilityState.selected=true
[fn] defaultChecked=true starts as selected (uncontrolled)
[fn] defaultChecked=false starts as unselected
[fn] controlled: selected prop drives state, press does not flip it
[fn] uncontrolled: press toggles internal state (false → true)
[fn] onChange fires with true on first press (unchecked → checked)
[fn] onChange fires with false when unchecking (checked → unchecked)
[fn] onPress fires on tap
[fn] onPress fires before onChange (onPress is raw tap handler)
[fn] both onPress and onChange fire on each press
[fn] disabled=true blocks onChange and onPress
[fn] readOnly=true blocks onChange and onPress
[fn] multiple presses fire onChange each time
[fn] label prop renders as visible text
[fn] children renders as label when label prop is not set
[fn] label prop takes precedence over children
[fn] description renders below label
[fn] label Text is accessible=false (Pressable carries accessibilityLabel)
[fn] testID is forwarded to the Pressable (the interactive element)
[fn] size="s" → box is 16px × 16px
[fn] size="m" → box is 20px × 20px (default)
[fn] size="l" → box is 24px × 24px
[fn] default size is "m"
[fn] box sizes are monotonically increasing: s < m < l
[fn] dot size is 50% of box size per size
[fn] disabled=true → accessibilityState.disabled=true
[fn] disabled=false → accessibilityState.disabled=false
[fn] readOnly=true → accessibilityState.disabled=false (readOnly ≠ disabled in a11y)
[fn] readOnly=true with checked=true → still shows selected=true
[a11y] accessibilityRole is "radio"
[a11y] getByRole("radio") finds the element
[a11y] accessible=true by default (Pressable is in a11y tree)
[a11y] unchecked → accessibilityState.selected=false
[a11y] checked → accessibilityState.selected=true
[a11y] accessibilityLabel from label prop
[a11y] aria-label overrides label as accessibilityLabel
[a11y] accessibilityLabel prop takes highest priority
[a11y] getByLabelText finds radio by label
[a11y] disabled → accessibilityState.disabled=true
[a11y] accessibilityHint forwarded to Pressable
[a11y] aria-hidden=true → accessible=false, accessibilityElementsHidden=true
[a11y] aria-hidden element not findable by getByRole
[bug] BUG-RADIO-1: readOnly=true — aria-readonly never set on Pressable
[bug] BUG-RADIO-1: disabled=true — aria-disabled never set despite being in ariaProps
[fn] BUG-RADIO-2 FIXED: readOnly=true → accessibilityState.readonly=true
[bug] BUG-RADIO-3: accent prop accepted without console.warn (deprecated)
[bug] BUG-RADIO-4: data-size and data-appearance not on native Pressable (dead code)
[bug] BUG-RADIO-5: appearance="sparkle" works in native but absent from Figma API
[bug] BUG-RADIO-6: Figma label=boolean+labelText vs native label=string — API mismatch
